user.title: Enaro Integration
user.description: Connect your Enaro account. Home Assistant will create one to-do list entity per Enaro household and can create Enaro tasks from sensor rules.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Enaro or credentials were rejected.

abort.already_configured: This Enaro account is already configured

add_rule.title: Add Enaro sensor rule
add_rule.description: Choose the Enaro household for the task that will be created.

add_rule_details.title: Sensor rule details
add_rule_details.description: Home Assistant creates one Enaro task after the entity stays in the target state for 5 minutes.

toggle_rule.title: Enable or disable Enaro sensor rule

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Enaro while loading households or members.
